art_direction.mood: premium Americana, dark heritage ecommerce, cinematic but believable
art_direction.typography_reference: heritage serif display with clean modern sans support

must_feel_like: realistic fabric folds and knit texture
prompting_notes: Reference the local public garment images for graphic placement, proportions, and styling consistency.
Keep the politically sensitive tribute product out of hero dominance.
Use recurring model IDs exactly to preserve continuity across images.

images.recurring_model_description: Black man, age 32, athletic build, warm brown skin, close-cropped hair, trimmed beard, calm rugged expression, premium workwear presence
images.wardrobe_details: Use public/true-american-wear/eagle-hoodie.jpg as the exact garment reference for the gray hoodie graphic, hood lining colors, and overall print placement. Style with black raw denim, dark leather boots, and a matte black trucker jacket worn open.
images.location: rural roadside overlook beside a vintage matte black pickup truck at sunset
images.composition: heroic single-subject composition with negative space for homepage headline copy
images.pose_or_action: standing against the truck door with one hand in pocket, looking past camera with quiet confidence
images.camera_framing: waist-up with extra environment space on the left
images.lens_look: 35mm full-frame editorial look with shallow but believable depth
images.lighting: golden hour backlight with soft fill, cinematic but natural skin rendering
realism_controls: editorial color grading with restrained contrast
images.final_prompt: Create an ultra realistic premium fashion campaign image for True American Wear. Use public/true-american-wear/eagle-hoodie.jpg as the garment reference so the gray hoodie matches the real product graphic, 1776 and 2026 placement, eagle wings, 250 Years print, and patriotic hood lining. Feature recurring model M01, a Black man age 32 with warm brown skin, close-cropped hair, trimmed beard, athletic build, rugged calm expression. He stands beside a matte black vintage pickup truck on a countryside overlook at sunset, styled with black raw denim, dark leather boots, and a trucker jacket worn open so the hoodie remains fully visible. Frame as a homepage hero banner with negative space for headline copy, waist-up, natural posture, believable golden hour light, realistic pores, realistic garment wrinkles, premium editorial fashion photography, cinematic but believable, dark luxury Americana, no AI gloss.

images.recurring_model_description: Black woman, age 29, deep brown skin, natural textured curls, strong cheekbones, understated luxury beauty, athletic slim build
images.secondary_model_description_if_any: White man, age 34, light olive skin, dirty blond hair, short stubble, square jaw, rugged ranch style
images.wardrobe_details: Use public/true-american-wear/flag-sweater.jpg as the exact reference for the black founders crewneck graphic. Use public/true-american-wear/red-stripes-shirt.jpg as the exact reference for the striped tee. Style her in the black crewneck over cream denim with western boots. Style him in the red striped shirt under a dark suede jacket.
images.location: open field at blue hour with a parked truck and distant tree line
images.composition: luxury couple editorial with the brand crest mood from public/true-american-wear/theme.jpg
images.pose_or_action: walking slowly toward camera with natural chemistry, she slightly leading, both serious and composed
images.camera_framing: medium-wide banner crop with space above and to the side for homepage copy
images.lighting: post-sunset ambient sky with soft directional fill and subtle bronze warmth
realism_controls: luxury ad polish without looking synthetic
images.final_prompt: Generate a premium Americana homepage banner for True American Wear featuring recurring models F01 and M02. Use public/true-american-wear/flag-sweater.jpg as the exact garment reference for the black Founders 1776 Crewneck and public/true-american-wear/red-stripes-shirt.jpg as the exact garment reference for the red striped 250 Years shirt, keeping print layout, typography, stripe rhythm, and proportions accurate. The couple walks through an open field near a parked dark pickup truck at blue hour, styled in western boots, cream denim, dark suede, and understated utility accessories. The mood should match the dark luxury ecommerce tone of public/true-american-wear/theme.jpg, with believable skin, natural expressions, real fabric drape, cinematic but realistic lighting, and generous composition space for homepage text.
